result.reasoning: Multi-modal single-cell study of vaccine responses using 10x Chromium 5' chemistry with paired GEX (scRNA-seq), TCR V(D)J, and ADT (CITE-seq) libraries from PBMC T cells across multiple vaccine recipients (VAC007-VAC015).
